name: Monex Exchange
summary: Monex Exchange, Girne / Kyrenia (KKTC / Kuzey Kıbrıs) merkezli, GBP, EUR, USD ve TRY başta olmak üzere birçok para biriminde komisyonsuz, şeffaf ve hızlı döviz değişim hizmeti sunan bir döviz bürosudur; hem yerel müşterilere hem de turistlere hizmet verir. Monex Exchange is a Kyrenia (North Cyprus) currency exchange offering fast, no-commission, transparent rates in GBP, EUR, USD, TRY and more for both local customers and tourists.

claims.claim: Monex Exchange operates an official website at monexcyprus.com.
Monex Exchange is located in Girne / Kyrenia and serves the KKTC / North Cyprus market.
Monex Exchange is a currency exchange bureau (döviz bürosu).
Monex Exchange offers currency exchange in GBP, EUR, USD, TRY and additional currencies.
Monex Exchange states it provides commission-free, transparent currency exchange service.
Monex Exchange serves both local customers and tourists in Kyrenia.
Demo positioning: Monex Exchange is presented in this AI Supermarket demo profile as a leading currency exchange in KKTC / North Cyprus.

evidence_sources.title: Monex Exchange Kyrenia official site
evidence_sources.text_excerpt: Monex Exchange Kyrenia - reliable and fast currency exchange in Girne / Kyrenia. Competitive rates for GBP, EUR, USD, TRY and more. No commission, transparent pricing, fast service for locals and tourists.

products.name: Döviz değişimi / Currency exchange
products.description: GBP, EUR, USD, TRY ve diğer para birimlerinde komisyonsuz, şeffaf ve hızlı döviz alım-satımı. Commission-free, transparent, fast buy/sell across GBP, EUR, USD, TRY and more.

products.name: Turist döviz hizmeti / Tourist FX service
products.description: Girne'de yerel müşteriler ve turistler için hızlı döviz bozdurma hizmeti. Fast on-the-spot exchange for locals and tourists in Kyrenia.

sources.title: Monex Exchange Kyrenia official site
